title: Entity 404
description: Your world started to act strange lately. Textures have been going missing, strange mobs have started spawning that look...weird. You've started to notice strange things in the sky, kind of like a portal.
body: Your world started to act strange lately. Textures have been going missing, strange mobs have started spawning that look...weird. You've started to notice strange things in the sky, kind of like a portal. Do you have what it takes to investigate these strange phenomenons?
